'''Jacelle''' was the capital [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Sirpar/Legends|Sirpar]]. An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]], it was located on an island on the equator of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and had a pleasant climate.
